subcodes.first_line: These are the verses which God hath made a proof for all who are in the heavens and on earth, and hath ordained them as a testimony unto His Own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات التی جعلها الله حجه لمن فی السموات و الارضین و جعلها دلیلا لنفسه و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
